title: IncentiveProgramTypeValues
description:
Earn rewards for referring a friend or opening an account.

Comment:
$50 bonus for referring a new account holder

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cashback Incentive Program
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Earn points or cashback for card usage.

Comment:
2 points per $1 spent on groceries

x-enumeration-literals.name: Travel Incentive Program
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Bonus points for booking flights, hotels, or spending on travel.

Comment:
Earn 3x points on airline tickets

x-enumeration-literals.name: Referral Incentive Program
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are given for successfully referring new customers.

Coment:
$50 bonus for referred friends who open accounts
Points or cashback for business referrals

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Incentive Program
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Extra points or perks for reaching spending milestones or maintaining high balances

Comment:
Platinum cardholders earn 1.5x points

x-enumeration-literals.name: Promotional Incentive Program
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Temporary multipliers or limited-time bonuses.

Comment:
Double points on dining during holidays

x-enumeration-literals.name: Charity Incentive Program
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Earn points for participating in charitable programs or CSR campaigns

Comment:
100 points per donation made via bank portal

x-enumeration-literals.name: Point Transfer Incentive Program
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Points earned can be transferred to partner programs.

Comment:
Transfer points to airline or hotel loyalty accounts
